message:
fix: coordinate mapping when download bar appears

- Capture frame dimensions when chrome inner dims come from extension resize
- Apply ratio adjustment when frame size changes (download bar)
- Fix npm author to teamch
- Bump version to 0.9.6

files.patch:

   "name": "termweb",
-  "version": "0.9.5",
+  "version": "0.9.6",
   "description": "Web browser in your terminal using Kitty graphics protocol. SDK for building terminal apps with web technologies.",
   "main": "./lib/index.js",
   "bin": {
